title: Exit 8
tmdbOverview: A man trapped in an endless sterile subway passageway sets out to find Exit 8. The rules of his quest are simple: do not overlook anything out of the ordinary. If you discover an anomaly, turn back immediately. If you don’t, carry on. Then leave from Exit 8. But even a single oversight will send him back to the beginning. Will he ever reach his goal and escape this infinite corridor?
synopsis: Exit 8 (2025) is a horror and mystery film from Japan. It carries a 6.4 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
